narrative:
Valley View-00-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 768 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
